LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALLIED HEATING AND AIR CONDITIONING CO, INC.'S DEMURRER TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREDERICK JUDICE IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; (302/HEK)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2019 CONTINUED TO MAR-13-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR DEFENDANT(S) TO FILE JUDGMENT FOLLOWING ORDER RE DEMURRER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2018 Continued To Mar-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Allied Heating and Air Conditioning Co, Inc.'s demurrer to all causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Frederick Judice is sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. No opposition filed. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; (302/HEK)
